FAIL: PDF p.238 Example 7 table header contains NHOID column between USUBJID and ISSEQ. Atom verbatim skips NHOID entirely: '...| USUBJID | ISSEQ | ISREFID |...' should be '...| USUBJID | NHOID | ISSEQ | ISREFID |...'. Missing column is a MAJOR verbatim error (R10 strict char-for-char). Also atom claims ISORRESU column (present in atom between ISORRES and ISSTRESC) but PDF Example 7 header does not show ISORRESU for this table. Column-count mismatch: atom=23 cols vs PDF=23 cols but NHOID absent + ISORRESU present = two compensating errors masking the true column-level failure.
